meaning: n.秋天,落下,瀑布,降低,落差,采伐量,堕落,下降vi.倒下,落下,来临,失守,变成,垮台,下跌,阵亡vt.<美><英方>击倒,砍倒(树木)adj.秋天的
examples: This fall the chain has opened outlets of upscale cosmetics purveyor Sephora in its stores.
Indeed, Mr Putin's military deployments signal that he will not let the Assad regime fall.
But attempting a repeat, he holed out tamely to deep mid-wicket to fall for 50.
